chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4525 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.20903/2023. 2. For orders on Misc. No.20904/2023. 3. For orders on Misc. No.20905/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. 21.09.2023. Mr. Taha Abdus Samad, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, alleging harassment on the part of functionaries of the Mines & Mineral Development Department, who are said to be causing interference in the lawful activities of the Petitioner at its premises situated within the precincts of the Sindh Industrial Trade Estate Limited, and demanding illegal gratification. No official act, order or notice emanating from the aforesaid Department has been impugned, and the Petition is even bereft of material particulars regarding the names and identities of the rogue officials of the Department, let-alone the dates and other details regarding their conduct. Under the circumstances, the matter does not present a fit case for issuance of a writ, and if the Petitioner is facing any harassment it may avail the remedies otherwise available under the law, including the registration of an appropriate criminal case against the persons engaging in such intimidation. Hence, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
